content: Backend: Excel templates + import for Users, Students, Classes, Rooms, Subjects
Backend: SMTP settings in SettingsModel + test endpoint
Backend: Email reset password flow (forgot + reset endpoints)
Backend: E-Rapor digital (Grade input + rapor per student)
Frontend Admin Pengaturan: Tab SMTP settings + test send button
Frontend LoginPage: Lupa password link → reset flow
Frontend Admin: Import buttons di Users/Classes/Rooms/Subjects/Siswa pages
Frontend Admin: Page Prestasi Siswa + Verifikasi
Frontend Guru/Admin: Page Ekstrakurikuler (CRUD + anggota + absensi + nilai)
Frontend Admin/Guru: Page E-Rapor (input nilai + preview rapor)
Frontend Siswa: Galeri Prestasi + E-Rapor view (read-only)
Phase 4: Mobile app Expo docs (separate codebase guide)
